name: Moon Over You
overview: At the end of the Nan Dynasty, the two parties of the Crown Prince and the Eldest Prince fought for power. Under the guidance of Lord Xiao Lin Zhou, the Crown Prince's group was getting powerful gradually. But Xiao Lin Zhou's great merits made the Crown Prince feel insecure. So the Crown Prince sent Qin Che, the Ninth Prince, to live in Xiao Lin Zhou's mansion so as to prevent him from meddling in state affairs. To make both sides satisfied, Qin Che stole the official letter and hid it in The Plenilune Tower.

trailers.title: 《风月不知秋Moon Over You》 EP 01 trailer⏩九皇子秦澈醉酒，异姓王爷萧凛舟出手搭救 | 朱浪/罗殿夏/李泽乾 | 优优青春剧场
